text.title: Infrastructure-as-Code Lint Floor (shellcheck, hadolint, yamllint, actionlint, tflint) Failure Modes
text.summary: ≥3 antipatterns observed in the wild. Each pairs symptom + root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Deploy script breaks because of unquoted variable; downtime.
antipattern.fix: Add shellcheck to pre-commit + CI; fix SC2086 across repo.

antipattern.symptom: GH Actions workflow uses removed `set-output`; runs fail silently.
rc file disables 20 rules; no comments explain why.
antipattern.fix: Audit; require justification per exclusion; remove unjustified.
